name: xml-comparison-mcp-server
description: High-performance XML file comparison with semantic analysis capabilities. Features StAX streaming parser for memory-efficient processing of large XML files (60MB+ tested), order-agnostic semantic comparison, and multiple output formats (text, JSON, Excel). Includes 5 MCP tools for comprehensive XML analysis and comparison.
